items.raw_desc: Klórozó CF GROUP ICS10 MEDIUM - automatikus adagolóállomás:The automatic dosing station ICS10 MEDIUM is an intelligent inverter salt chlorinator that takes care of the disinfection of your pool water. The Solinator provides efficient, economical and environmentally friendly production of chlorine gas directly from pool salt, eliminating the need to add traditional chemicals to the pool. In addition, the device automatically measures and adjusts the pH value so that the pool water has the optimal chemical balance and is thus as gentle as possible on your eyes and skin. The dosing station is easy to operate thanks to clear LED indication and an intuitive touch screen. Thanks to Wi-Fi connectivity, you can also easily control the device using the InverGo mobile app. The ICS10 MEDIUM is designed for pools with a water volume of up to 45 m³ and can produce 10 grams of chlorine per hour.
